case_title: ODHAMS, JOE W. VS CARNEIRO, KATHLEEN DUFFY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ODHAMS, JOE W.
